title: V-TAC 100W LED Outdoor Floodlight - [High Performance] - IP65-8700 Lumen - Waterproof Lamp for Home, Garden, Garage, Factory - Cool White Light 6500k
features: V-TAC LED PROJECTOR: 100W outdoor LED floodlight with brightness of 8700 lumens date high performance LED for direct current management.

MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY AND ENERGY SAVING: Thanks to its energy rating and the exceptional Limenwatt ratio of 100kW/1000h, you can leave your headlight on all night without worrying about too high electricity costs.

IP65, SOLID, RELIABLE:Outdoor LED headlight Made of die-cast aluminum and tempered glass, built-in sealed silicone ring, water and dust proof with total dust isolation and powerful water jets. IP65 rated, it will not suffer damage from atmospheric agents, perfect for illuminating the entrance of your home or any other shaded area outdoors, making the environment safer and more welcoming.

EXCEPTIONAL LIGHTING: The V-TAC outdoor spotlight offers a strong and decisive light and thanks to the 100 degree beam angle, it is possible to direct the light beams accurately, creating aesthetic but equally functional light effects.

specifications_table.Special features: ‎Anti-Rust, Energy Efficient, Foldable, Shock Resistant, Waterproof
